attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	 (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT          FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR FY  WHERE FY.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME=ST.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME )  AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT, 
FISCAL_MONTH_NAME             	,
FISCAL_YEAR_ID                	,
INCIDENT_NUMBER               	,
INCIDENT_STATUS_ID            	,
INCIDENT_STATUS               	,
BL_INCIDENT_KEY               	,
DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY          	,
CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY          	,
CHG_WKGRP_NAME                	,
CHG_WKGRP_THEATER_NAME        	,
CHG_WKGRP_DELIVERY_CHANNEL    	,
ACTIVITY_CODE                 	,
ACTIVITY_DATE                 	,
ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME            	,
ACTS_TSLA                     	,
ACTS_CONSISTENCY_CONSTANT     	,
ACTS_MEDIAN_TSLA              	,
ACTS_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA       	,
ACTS_MEDIAN_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA	,
ACTS_MEDIAN_ABS_DEV_THRESHOLD 	,
ACTS_OUTLIER_FLAG             	,
ACTS_MEAN_NON_OUTLIER_TSLA    	,
ACTS_WORKTIME                 	,
DW_LOAD_DATE                  	,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                	,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER               	,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                	,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER           ,
FISCAL_MONTH_ID    	
FROM	
$$STGDB.ST_ACTS_TSLA_WORKTIME_F ST

SELECT
RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME AS FISCAL_MONTH_NAME             
,NSAA.BK_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_ID
,CAST(NSAA.BK_SR_NUM_INT AS VARCHAR(64)) as INCIDENT_NUMBER
,NULL AS INCIDENT_STATUS_ID
,NSAA.SR_STATUS_NAME as INCIDENT_STATUS
,NULL AS BL_INCIDENT_KEY
,NSAA.DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY_ID as DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY
,NSAA.SK_CHANGE_DW_WG_KEY as  CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY
,NSAA.CHANGE_WORKGROUP_NAME as CHG_WKGRP_NAME
,NSAA.CHANGE_WG_THEATER_NAME as CHG_WKGRP_THEATER_NAME
,NSAA.CHANGE_DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME as CHG_WKGRP_DELIVERY_CHANNEL
,NSAA.BK_ACTIVITY_CD_INT AS ACTIVITY_CODE
,NSAA.ACTIVITY_DTM AS ACTIVITY_DATE
,NSAA.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME AS ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME
,NSAA.TSLA_MINUTES_CNT as ACTS_TSLA
,CAST(NSAA.ACTS_CONSISTENCY_CONSTANT_AMT AS INT) as ACTS_CONSISTENCY_CONSTANT
,NSAA.ACTS_MEDIAN_TSLA_AMT as ACTS_MEDIAN_TSLA
,NSAA.ACTS_ABSLT_DVTN_TSLA_MINS_CNT AS ACTS_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA
,NSAA.ACTS_MDN_ABSLT_DVTN_TSLA_AMT as ACTS_MEDIAN_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA
,NSAA.ACTS_MDN_ABSLT_DVTN_THRSLD_AMT as ACTS_MEDIAN_ABS_DEV_THRESHOLD
,NSAA.ACTS_OUTLIER_FLG as ACTS_OUTLIER_FLAG
,NSAA.ACTS_MEAN_NON_OUTLIER_TSLA_AMT as ACTS_MEAN_NON_OUTLIER_TSLA
,NSAA.WORKTIME_ADJSTD_FOR_ACTS_CNT as ACTS_WORKTIME
,CAST(NSAA.ACTS_MEASURE_CALC_DT AS timestamp(0))as DW_LOAD_DATE
,NSAA.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,NSAA.EDW_CREATE_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,NSAA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,NSAA.EDW_UPDATE_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_MONTH_ID
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_ACTIVITY_ACTS NSAA
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = NSAA.BK_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = NSAA.BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
ON NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY = NSAA.CHANGE_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
WHERE RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_CTRL)
